channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 3 US warplanes shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses, pilots bail out in friendly fire incident, CENTCOM says
item.description: Three U.S. Air Force F-15E Strike Eagles were mistakenly shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses during active combat operations linked to Operation Epic Fu...

item.title: Trump: I Got Khamenei First, Tried to Kill Me Twice
item.description: President Donald Trump said Sunday that he struck Iran's leadership before Ayatollah Ali Khamenei could succeed in another attempt on his life. "I got...

item.title: Gen. Clark to Newsmax: Iran's Leader Must Stand Down
item.description: Retired U.S. Army Gen. Wesley Clark told Newsmax on Sunday that the road ahead in Iran will be very challenging following the death of Ayatollah Ali K...

item.title: Trump: US Casualties Could Rise in Iran Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump said Sunday that Pentagon projections indicate U.S. casualties in the escalating conflict with Iran could climb beyond the thre...

item.title: CA Governor Tries to Troll Trump Over Fuel Prices, but Is Savagely Brought Back to Reality by Gas Assoc.
Chasing the apocalypse: Radical Shiite clerics on American soil preach prophetic showdown with US
item.description: Pro-regime U.S. mosques spread end-times theology casting America as an enemy 'empire' before arrival of "the Mahdi"

item.title: Is the US Running Out of Missiles? No, but There's Cause for Concern
Speaker Johnson Expects War Powers Vote Thursday
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, R-La., told fellow Republicans on a conference call Sunday that the House will likely vote Thursday on a war powers resolu...

item.title: Former President Bill Clinton deposed in Epstein probe in potential first for Congress
item.description: The House Oversight Committee compelled former President Bill Clinton to testify in its Jeffrey Epstein investigation, raising questions about precede...

item.title: New Reports: Gulf States Draw Line, More Countries Now Ready to Counter Iran With Force

item.description: Sen. Bill Hagerty, R-Tenn., told Newsmax Sunday it is time for Democrats to stop playing politics and support President Donald Trump and his decision ...

item.title: House Republicans push Johnson to go to war with Senate over SAVE Act
item.description: Some House Republicans are pressuring Speaker Mike Johnson to fight the Senate GOP over the SAVE America Act

item.title: Trumpâs Iran strike rocks Texas Senate race as Dems demand âwar powers,â GOP applauds president
item.description: Military strikes in Iran have opened up a partisan rift in Texas' looming Senate primaries. Republicans praise Trump's operation while Democrats deman...
